data.title: Explore Reliable and Affordable Used Trucks at We Auto in Baton Rouge, LA
data.description: In Baton Rouge, Louisiana, on April 10, 2026, We Auto dealership provides a diverse range of top-notch pre-owned trucks renowned for their reliability and performance. Customers can benefit from flexible financing options and a personalized shopping process. The dealership caters to drivers looking for affordable, trustworthy pickup trucks and offers a wide selection to choose from.

data.title: UpGuard Ranked #1 for Third Party and Supplier Risk Management; Named Top 100 Software Company in G2 2026 Best Software Awards
data.description: UpGuard, a cybersecurity and risk management company based in Mountain View, California, has been named the top leader in Third Party and Supplier Risk Management by G2 for 15 consecutive quarters. This recognition was announced on April 10, 2026. G2 is recognized as the world's largest platform for tech and software reviews. UpGuard's consistent performance and excellence in managing third-party and supplier risks have earned them this prestigious recognition for over 3 years.

data.title: tm:rw Announces Shaquille O'Neal as Investor, Partner, and Global Ambassador
data.description: Shaquille O'Neal has officially endorsed tm:rw as the worldwide hub of innovation. In a significant move announced on April 10, 2026, tm:rw revealed that O'Neal is joining the organization as an investor, partner, and global ambassador. This partnership signifies a major milestone for tm:rw, highlighting its growing influence in the innovation sector.

data.title: Americans Are Rethinking European Travel This Spring - Here's Where They're Going Instead
data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida on April 10, 2026, it was reported that April typically signals the beginning of the European travel season for numerous Americans. data.title: Ocean Power Technologies to Participate in Water Tower Research Insights Conference on April 15, 2026
data.description: On April 10, 2026, in Monroe Township, New Jersey, it was reported that Ocean Power Technologies, Inc. (NYSE American: OPTT) disclosed that Philipp Stratmann, the President and CEO of the company, will be attending the Water Tower Research Insights Conference on April 15, 2026, at 02:30 PM EST.

data.title: BitFuFu Announces March 2026 Bitcoin Production and Operational Updates
data.description: In March 2026, BitFuFu recorded the production of 214 BTC and held 1,794 BTC. They manage a total hashrate of 25.9 EH/s.

data.title: ASP Isotopes to Host Business Update Conference Call on April 13, 2026, at 8:00 AM ET
data.description: On April 10, 2026, ASP Isotopes Inc. (NASDAQ: ASPI), a company specializing in advanced materials for various industries, disclosed that Paul Mann, the Executive Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, will conduct a business update session on Monday, April 13, 2026, at 8:00 AM Eastern Time. This webcast aims to provide insights into the company's technological advancements and production strategies.

data.title: LifeMD® Now Offering Eli Lilly and Company’s Foundayo™ (orforglipron), a New GLP-1 Pill for Weight Management
data.description: LifeMD is enhancing its weight management program by introducing Foundayo. This addition provides eligible patients with an oral substitute for injectable GLP-1 therapies via LillyDirect®. This expansion aims to improve accessibility and convenience for individuals seeking weight management solutions.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Wavers Ahead Of CPI Inflation Data; Nvidia Chipmaker TSMC Jumps (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index showed fluctuation on Friday in anticipation of the upcoming release of the CPI inflation report. TSMC, a chipmaker for Nvidia, experienced a significant surge in stock value due to robust sales. The market is closely monitoring these developments as investors await further updates.

data.title: New York Stock Exchange Celebrates 50 Years of NYSE Arca Options Trading
data.description: The NYSE is marking a significant milestone this month as it celebrates 50 years of options trading on NYSE Arca Options.

data.title: New VantageScore RiskRatio™ Digital Release Enables Mortgage Lenders, Auto Lenders and ABS Investors to Strengthen Consumer Credit Risk Benchmarking
data.description: In San Francisco, VantageScore unveiled an important update for VantageScore RiskRatio™, a credit risk analytics tool aiding mortgage, auto lenders, and ABS investors in assessing and responding to consumer credit default risk. The suite of digital tools offered by VantageScore allows users to access interactive credit insights across different models, industries, and lifecycle stages. Alongside RiskRatio™ and CreditGauge™, the suite features Inclusion360® as well.

data.title: Angel Announces Timing of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results
data.description: Provo, Utah-based media and technology company Angel (NYSE: ANGX) is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026, after market close on Thursday, April 30, 2026. Following this, on Friday, May 1, 2026, the company will conduct a webinar starting at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to review the results and address inquiries from the sell-side community. For participation in the webinar, interested parties can utilize the provided dial-in numbers or registration process.

data.title: Interra Capital Group Acquires Greenway Plaza, a 4.5 Million-Square-Foot, 53-Acre Landmark Mixed-Use Campus in Houston - CBRE Appointed to Lead Leasing
data.description: Today, Interra Capital Group revealed the purchase of Greenway Plaza, a well-known 53-acre mixed-use office complex in Houston. This significant acquisition comprises around 4.5 million square feet of office space. Greenway Plaza stands as one of the leading commercial properties in Houston, signifying a strategic investment for Interra Capital Group.

data.title: Ingles Markets Issues Presentation Detailing Material Information Summer Road and Rory Held Have Failed to Disclose to Ingles Shareholders, Including Risks Illustrated by Their Prior Involvement at Peak Resorts
data.description: Ingles Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ: IMKTA) of Asheville, North Carolina revealed details of their upcoming Annual Meeting of Shareholders on April 30, 2026. They released a presentation exposing undisclosed facts by Sacklers' Summer Road LLC and nominee Rory Held, emphasizing risks linked to their past association with Peak Resorts. This presentation highlights crucial information that shareholders should consider before the Annual Meeting.

data.title: SunOpta Announces Early Termination of Hart-Scott-Rodino Act Waiting Period Related to Proposed Acquisition by Refresco
data.description: Minneapolis-based SunOpta Inc., a North American supply chain solutions provider, recently revealed the early termination of the waiting period under the Hart-Scott-Rodino Antitrust Improvements Act of 1976 in relation to the planned acquisition of the company by a Refresco Holding B.V. affiliate. The acquisition is set at US$6.50 per share in cash. SunOpta is listed on the Nasdaq as STKL and on the Toronto Stock Exchange as SOY.

data.title: EMBRAER S.A. ANNOUNCES MATERIAL FACT NEW CFO
data.description: In São José dos Campos, Brazil, on April 10, 2026, Embraer S.A. announced that Mr. Felipe Santana Santiago de Lima has been elected as the Executive Vice President of Financial & Investor Relations by the Company's Board of Directors. This decision impacts all shareholders and investors with stakes in Embraer S.A. The appointment of Mr. Lima signifies a strategic move for the company, highlighting its focus on enhancing financial operations and investor communication.

data.title: Vivatides Therapeutics Announces Oversubscribed $54 Million Series A Financing to Accelerate Extrahepatic RNA Therapeutics Development
data.description: Vivatides Therapeutics, an international biotech firm based in SUZHOU, China and BOSTON, revealed on April 10, 2026, its commitment to advancing advanced RNA therapeutics for targets beyond the liver. The company specializes in developing cutting-edge delivery technologies for extrahepatic RNA-targeting medications. This signifies a significant milestone in the realm of RNA-based treatments, with Vivatides Therapeutics spearheading this innovative approach. The company's mission is to revolutionize the treatment landscape by expanding the reach of RNA therapeutics beyond traditional confines, marking a potentially groundbreaking development in the field.
